# Mini-App SDK

This is the official JavaScript SDK for building Mini-Apps that run securely within the Flutter Container Host.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @ebisa-tesfaye/miniapp-sdk
```

## Usage

```javascript
import { MiniApp } from "@ebisa-tesfaye/miniapp-sdk";

// Initialize with Manifest
MiniApp.init({
  appId: "com.example.app",
  permissions: ["auth.profile", "device.camera", "payments.request"]
}).then(() => {
  console.log("SDK Ready!");
});

// Example: Take a Photo
MiniApp.camera.open().then(photo => {
  console.log(photo.url);
});

// Example: Process a Payment
MiniApp.payments.requestPayment({
  amountMinor: 599,
  currency: "USD",
  description: "Coffee"
}).then(transaction => {
  console.log(transaction.status);
});
```

## APIs Provided
- `MiniApp.auth.login()`, `MiniApp.auth.getProfile()`, `MiniApp.auth.getToken()`
- `MiniApp.camera.open()`
- `MiniApp.device.scanner.scan()`
- `MiniApp.device.location.getCurrentPosition()`
- `MiniApp.device.clipboard.readText()`, `MiniApp.device.clipboard.writeText()`
- `MiniApp.device.file.pick()`
- `MiniApp.ui.showModal()`, `MiniApp.ui.toast()`
- `MiniApp.storage.setItem()`, `MiniApp.storage.getItem()`
- `MiniApp.payments.requestPayment()`
